# VDS General Trading LLC
> UAE-registered Dubai trading company: AI voice automation agents, digital marketing (SEO/GEO/AEO), agro commodity trading, and MOHAP-compliant medical equipment.

## Services

### AI Voice & Email Automation
- AI agents handling 24/7 inbound calls, lead qualification, and customer operations
- Deploy for UAE businesses: hospitality, real estate, healthcare, retail
- URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/ai-automation

### Digital Marketing (SEO/GEO/AEO)
- SEO: rank #1 on Google for Dubai and UAE keywords
- GEO: appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- AEO: featured snippets and voice search optimisation
- URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/digital-marketing

### Agro Commodity Trading
- Wholesale onion, potato, garlic, ginger, pulses, spices
- FOB origins: India, Pakistan, Egypt, Netherlands, Australia
- Export to UAE, GCC, Europe, United States via Jebel Ali Free Zone
- URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/agro-trading

### Healthcare Equipment (MOHAP-Compliant)
- Diagnostic, surgical, imaging, monitoring, lab, rehabilitation equipment
- Supply and rental to hospitals, clinics, polyclinics in UAE and GCC
- Full MOHAP documentation and traceability
- URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/healthcare-equipment

## Company

- Legal name: VDS General Trading LLC
- Registration: UAE (Dubai)
- Markets: UAE, GCC, Europe, United States
- Contact: sales@vdsdxb.ae | +971 54 269 5401
- Website: https://vdsdxb.ae
